title: Wandering Orc
description: just some orc and someother mobs that wander around the world ready to annoy you.
body:
![Wandering Orc Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f63f00c5f803e79a57765a4ebdf70304c174910.png)
# **REQUIREMENT**
**Fabric :**

Geckolib & AzurLib

**Forge :**

Geckolib, Azurlib, Forgified Fabric Api, & Sinytra Connector

"Geckolib used for mob rendering, and Azurlib used for armor rendering. this seperate rendering is used because sinytra connector are more friendly with azurlib on 1.20.1, converting mod is still out of my reach. that is why i have to do this so it would work with both forge and fabric."

 
## 
## **ABOUT WANDERING ORC**

**About Targeting,** you can add entity id as much you want in assets/tags/entity_types/orc_enemies.json. adding the entity id will make the orcs target them. i already add a few since i play it. 


**About Config,** from version 1.20 of wandering orc, there is a new config:

1. **Natural and Orc Mob Damage and Health Config.**

2. **Orc Spawn Config (Patrol Spawn, and Natural Spawn)**
   - Patrol Spawn now have settings on night spawn, chance of spawning, and interval of spawning.
   
3. **General Config**

- Settings for crawler

- Settings for infected block (**default are set to not spread**), you can set the spread chance to make the infected block spread (**careful with this**). there is max hardness to infect. make how strong the infected block can spread (**default are set to infect as strong as deepslate blocks**).

- about Infected Block, infected block are block that crawler plant to make the undead that touch it to have strength I. there is a treant essence dirt to counter this infected block (basically infect the infected block to become a dirt block)
  
- Natural Mob Spawn Rate, this one to settings the natural mob spawn rate default are 0.5

**About Orc Spawning,** Since version 1.20 of Wandering Orc. Natural Spawn are only for common orc. uncommon orc, only spawn on patrol which default 

**About Mobs,** Version 1.20 of Wandering Orc. Orc Tribe, are classified by Boss, Uncommon, and Common Mob. the only different are only their HP and Damage. Common got low HP, and Uncommon are minibosses with more HP now.

Orcs can now be friendly to you if you consume an item that you buy from goblin trader that wander around the world. you need to exchange that item, by collecting item that dropped from the orc minibosses.

Some items are exclusive that you can get from buying recipe from female orc that sell. so, by gaining their respect you can get their exclusive item.


**Special Thanks To Mebahel's Antique Beasts**,  since his source code helped me up to this point. I recommend Mebahel's Antique Beasts since Wandering Orc will conflict with his mob, it makes the world feels less empty and there is fighting activity around. 
Go download the mod here ->> [Mebahel's Antique Beasts](https://modrinth.com/mod/mebahels-antique-beasts).
